to Assette/assette-ai-plugin (the public mirror) carries it into
the mirror's root. Clients then install from the MIRROR repo:
Cowork users add the same marketplace through the desktop app:
is the INTERNAL install path (for platform engineers with access to the
private source repo) and points at the assette-plugin/
subdirectory of THIS repo. The two manifests are otherwise identical and
MUST be version-bumped together when releasing.
source.path = '.' because after the subtree split, this plugin's contents
name: assette

plugins.name: assette
plugins.description: Assette implementation toolkit for Assette client firms. Bundles a Node.js MCP shim that proxies the hosted Assette server plus the assette-plugin config/lifecycle skill; the five authoring skills (pptx, xlsx, block, data-object, classification) are downloaded from the hosted server after B2C sign-in. The fabricator skills still spawn Python on-demand (pptx helpers / openpyxl).
